CustomField.description: INTEGRATION FIELD: Used heavily by Gainsight. This is a measurement of Sentiment + usage. It is calculated to be an overall score for all products. A score of F means that all products are being canceled. a score of F along with a Churn Date in the past, will cause the record type to change from Customer to Previous Customer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is a measurement of Sentiment + usage. It is calculated to be an overall score for all products. A score of F means that all products are being canceled. a score of F along with a Churn Date in the past, will cause the record type to change from Customer to Previous Customer.
CustomField.label: Gainsight Overall Score
